title: davallia forsteri
intro: Davallia forsteri, also known as the forked fern or forster's davallia, is a species of fern in the family Davalliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are derived from its saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Davallia forsteri include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into tea, or used in infusions and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
